title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama, making it trivial to call local LLMs from Python scripts.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to any Ollama model via REST.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API and reactive streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama local server.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and prompt templating CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets a server chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that adds Ollama chat and code-completion panels.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that answers workspace questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama as an async chat endpoint with JWT auth.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that provides a typed service and controller for Ollama interactions.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate offering an async client for the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper that adds Ollama as a backend for LangChainEx and custom GenServers.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for private RAG: indexes your vault with Ollama embeddings and chats inline.
